reviews.review_description: Me and my dad looked at this game and we thought it was good and OMG it was! Me and my dad did a challenge to see who could get the most runs total with leg spin, off spin, mystery spin, fast, and fast seam. Overall this awesome game is definitely recommend for huge cricket fans!

This game is great for a free game, but there’s a few issues for me, mainly around fielding. I don’t think I’ve ever been caught out regardless of how easy the catch was, and even defensive shots score you runs.
The game is too good for free! The league matches idea is good ,but the simulate button is not working for the opponent innings for using the league matches.Otherwise it's pretty good
This game too good for a free game its better than having nothing
But it’s good

When your ball goes somewhere like behind the wicket the fielders just stay their so you have to leave and rejoin. And this game gave my right controller a boo boo. Play this game if you want to destroy your funiture
When I open the game it's stuck on loading
So fun love the game so much
Peak
This does not work anymore. Once you complete a game, all the buttons are disabled and cant simulate. This used to work fine before.
I have played free version of cover drive 22 which is much better version and UI is smooth and clear but this paid is worst and doesn’t support at all
If you want to have fun definitely recommend and if you like cricket then defo play it
This game is bad ,if the ball is behind fielders they still go forwards.The quality is bad aswell,if you want to play cricket on your vr please get ib cricket.
If a ball goes behind wicketkeeper, no one will collect it and game will be struck forever

This cricket game on Meta Quest is incredibly fun and realistic. Batting feels natural, the stadium atmosphere is immersive, and the gameplay is smooth. A must-try for any cricket fan — it’s the closest thing to playing real cricket in VR! 🏏🔥

For a game that I was able to play for free this is amazing, the game is decently realistic with the harder difficulty settings, I played other paid cricket games but they were disappointing, this game has a lot of potential.

By far the best cricket game I have played, although not a lot of features you still get to feel like a part of a team.

Looking forward for updates with a lot more features and diversity.
For being a free game this is honestly one of the best.
My dad loved it
It's a good game, you can play the game for long time, still some small bugs are existing, however I enjoy this game a lot.
This game is so bad ￼ I can’t think of anything good to say about this game, but I can list on for the whole day about how bad it is. Please don’t buy this game. It is a waste of storage ￼

When i started playing any of the challenge which is more than 1 over it's getting stucked after 2 or 3 overs of the game. Cleared cache, uninstalled and installed, multiple restarts also made but issue remains same.
Gud game if you want to play cricket for free in vr

Simulating the bowling doesn’t work
￼

Horizontal bat shots are not detected rather bat do not connect to ball. 
Many shots go to keeper as one bounce even if they are middled.
Worst vr game ever

reviews.review_title: Great for cricket fans and the rest!!
reviews.review_description:
I love playing this, it’s been decades since I played and I played cricket non stop before. 
This has brought me back to playing, feeling and loving the game I grew up with. 
You’ll enjoy this game and hitting, blocking and playing to chase down a total to win the game.
Vsysgvbd

reviews.review_title: Batting is good, other areas can improve
reviews.review_description:
The gameplay is great, Batting is fun, but the fielders do a terrible job fielding in all modes and that makes it a little too easy to get runs. I also wish you could choose between batting first and chasing in quick matches.

I cannot get replay to work either.
Regardless, this is a very fun game that happens to be free. 5 stars

reviews.review_title: Stuck at loading when game starts
reviews.review_description: The game is stuck in a loading screen despite being downloaded. Several glitches and bugs. Appeared to work until this morning. Re installing has not helped

I'm unable to simulate in league matches where I get stuck and unable to proceed. Also there are few glitches like few times there was keeper without gloves and he would leave all deliveries which would run away for 4b.

reviews.review_title: Love it except for the bugs
reviews.review_description: I think its really good for a free game but so many bugs I cant simulate  the other teams score so I can bat but that it. I am hoping there will be a fix as its great fun to play so thank you.
Needs lot of improvements ,very poor graphics,players are looking like zombies.nit a fun game.kindly refund my 20 dollars

I can’t simulate the bowling in leagues mode
Hope someone has a solution for this…

Compared to big games like ib cricket, it is very good. Only problem I have with it is the controls menu and other menus. When I try to change stuff, there is nothing there to change. Aside from that great game would recommend!

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the review! What kind of stuff isn't there to change? I''ve fixed a few bugs recently, so hopefully that's fixed your issue too 🙏

reviews.review_description: Love the game but not bowling don’t seem complete

reviews.review_title: It's superb game and more over it's free
reviews.review_description:
Iam Playing this game since one month and I daily play odi and target this game is unbelievable 
so far this is the best ever cricket game I played, it is very reality like playing in real ground experience I loved it a lot 
it's my alternative option where I can play cricket In door daily
pros: it's pro is first of all it's free so every cricket lover will love it
it is so real that you feel like Virat and Dhoni
you can play odi, which is super cool.
super over, practice etc...
CONS: some times it gets stuck or frame rate drops but iam telling you it's only while app starts so close the app and start again.. some times you need to restart app 3 to 4 times....
No day and night match and stadiums please give atleas one day and night match
bowling mainly focused on off side as Iam left hand batsman I have to play most of the time legside please fix it....
rather it's very fantastic and I suggest it's must have game in your VR.....thank you
can reach me at Rajesh 8074075646

developer_response.body:
Hi Rajesh, thanks for your feedback.

I'm working on fixing the bugs, and more stadiums and day/night are planned. In the meantime, there's a setting to switch between right- and left-handed batting, in the Settings menu. 

Glad you're enjoying CDC!

reviews.review_title: Realistic free cricket game. Love it!
reviews.review_description:
I honestly love this game. It’s a realistic cricket game. It’s free, at least for now and I end up playing this every day despite having a load of paid games. So good job!  Since this is on App Lab, I don’t expect perfection. That said, there are some serious bugs that needs to be fixed. 

Defects
1) Bowlers break in half sometimes and bowls a dead ball, but it’s considered a valid ball. Happens often. 
2) if you get bowled in a ball, in the next bowl, even before the ball reaches you, you’ll be declared out again and it shows bowled. This is very unfair and happens often. 

Suggestion
1) Instead of the batsman having to press ‘Bowl’ after every single ball, why not let the bowler ball the next ball by default? Leave the option to pause the next ball if the batsman is not ready. You can save a load of unnecessary trigger clicks with this change.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for your feedback! I'll double check if those bugs have been fixed recently, or I'll make sure to add them to my list to fix. In the meantime, there's an 'auto-bowl' setting you can use if that's what you'd prefer :)

reviews.review_description: Doesn’t work. Hangs when started
A really nice cricket game - looking forward to replays being fixed and it will be 5 stars
Love it so much
